# Contact Us (/docs/contact)



Contact Us [#contact-us]

We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or partnership inquiry, feel free to reach out.

Email [#email]

For general inquiries and support:

**[support@soraalternatives.com](mailto:support@soraalternatives.com)**

We typically respond within 1-2 business days.

What We Can Help With [#what-we-can-help-with]

* **Content corrections:** Found an outdated price or feature description? Let us know and we'll update it.
* **Partnership inquiries:** Interested in having your AI video tool reviewed or listed on our site?
* **Guest contributions:** Want to write a comparison or tutorial for our blog?
* **General feedback:** Suggestions to improve the site are always welcome.

Affiliate Disclosure [#affiliate-disclosure]

Sora Alternatives contains affiliate links. If you have questions about our editorial process or affiliate relationships, don't hesitate to contact us directly.


# Privacy Policy (/docs/privacy)



Privacy Policy [#privacy-policy]

**Last Updated:** April 8, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Sora Alternatives ("we," "us," or "our") collects, uses, and protects your information when you visit soraalternatives.com (the "Site").

1\. Information We Collect [#1-information-we-collect]

1.1 Information You Provide [#11-information-you-provide]

We may collect information that you voluntarily provide when you:

* Contact us via email or contact forms
* Subscribe to newsletters or notifications
* Leave comments or participate in discussions

1.2 Automatically Collected Information [#12-automatically-collected-information]

When you visit the Site, we may automatically collect:

* **Log Data:** IP address, browser type, operating system, referring URLs, pages visited, and access times
* **Device Information:** Hardware model, screen resolution, and device identifiers
* **Usage Data:** How you interact with the Site, including clicks, scroll depth, and time spent on pages

1.3 Cookies and Tracking Technologies [#13-cookies-and-tracking-technologies]

We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:

* Analyze website traffic and usage patterns
* Remember your preferences and settings
* Improve website performance and user experience

You can control cookie settings through your browser preferences.

2\. How We Use Your Information [#2-how-we-use-your-information]

We use the collected information to:

* Operate and maintain the Site
* Analyze usage trends to improve our content and user experience
* Respond to inquiries and provide customer support
* Send newsletters or updates (only if you have opted in)
* Comply with legal obligations

3\. Third-Party Services [#3-third-party-services]

3.1 Analytics [#31-analytics]

We may use third-party analytics services (such as Google Analytics) to collect and analyze usage data. These services may use cookies and similar technologies.

3.2 Affiliate Links [#32-affiliate-links]

The Site contains affiliate links to third-party AI video services. When you click on an affiliate link:

* You may be redirected to the third-party's website
* The third-party may set their own cookies
* We may receive a commission if you make a purchase

Third-party websites are governed by their own privacy policies, which we encourage you to review.

4\. Data Sharing [#4-data-sharing]

We do **not** sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share anonymized, aggregated data for analytical purposes.

We may share your information with third-party service providers who assist us in operating the Site (e.g., hosting, analytics), subject to confidentiality agreements.

5\. Data Retention [#5-data-retention]

We retain your personal information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required by law.

6\. Your Rights [#6-your-rights]

Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to:

* Access the personal information we hold about you
* Request correction or deletion of your personal information
* Object to or restrict the processing of your personal information
* Request data portability
* Withdraw consent at any time

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us.

7\. Data Security [#7-data-security]

We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

8\. Children's Privacy [#8-childrens-privacy]

The Site is not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

9\. International Transfers [#9-international-transfers]

If you access the Site from outside our primary operating region, your information may be transferred to and processed in other jurisdictions. By using the Site, you consent to such transfers.

10\. Changes to This Privacy Policy [#10-changes-to-this-privacy-policy]

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any material changes by posting the updated policy on this page with a revised "Last Updated" date.

11\. Contact Us [#11-contact-us]

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at &#x2A;*[support@soraalternatives.com](mailto:support@soraalternatives.com)** or visit our [Contact Us](/docs/contact) page.


# Terms of Service (/docs/terms)



Terms of Service [#terms-of-service]

**Last Updated:** April 8, 2026

Please read these Terms of Service ("Terms") carefully before using the Sora Alternatives website (the "Site") at soraalternatives.com.

1\. Acceptance of Terms [#1-acceptance-of-terms]

By accessing or using the Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Site.

2\. Description of Service [#2-description-of-service]

Sora Alternatives is an informational website that provides comparisons, reviews, and guides about AI video generation tools and services. We are not a provider of AI video generation services.

3\. Affiliate Disclosure [#3-affiliate-disclosure]

The Site contains **affiliate links** to third-party services, including but not limited to Pollo AI. If you click on an affiliate link and make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you. Our editorial content is independent of our affiliate partnerships.

4\. Information Accuracy [#4-information-accuracy]

We strive to provide accurate and up-to-date information about AI video tools, including pricing, features, and capabilities. However:

* AI tools update frequently; information may become outdated
* Pricing and features are subject to change by the respective service providers
* We recommend verifying all information directly with the service provider before making a decision

**We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any information on the Site.**

5\. Third-Party Services [#5-third-party-services]

The Site contains links to third-party websites and services. These services are governed by their own terms of service and privacy policies. We are not responsible for:

* The content, practices, or policies of third-party services
* Any products or services offered by third parties
* Any damages or losses resulting from your use of third-party services

6\. User Conduct [#6-user-conduct]

You agree not to:

* Use the Site for any unlawful purpose
* Attempt to interfere with the proper functioning of the Site
* Reproduce, distribute, or commercially exploit Site content without prior written consent
* Use automated tools to scrape or collect data from the Site

7\. Intellectual Property [#7-intellectual-property]

All content on the Site, including text, graphics, logos, and design elements, is the property of Sora Alternatives unless otherwise stated. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our written permission.

8\. Disclaimer of Warranties [#8-disclaimer-of-warranties]

The Site is provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the Site, including but not limited to:

* The Site will be uninterrupted or error-free
* The results from using information on the Site will meet your expectations
* Any errors on the Site will be corrected

9\. Limitation of Liability [#9-limitation-of-liability]

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Sora Alternatives shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Site.

10\. Changes to Terms [#10-changes-to-terms]

We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting on the Site. Your continued use of the Site after any changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms.

11\. Contact [#11-contact]

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at &#x2A;*[support@soraalternatives.com](mailto:support@soraalternatives.com)** or visit our [Contact Us](/docs/contact) page.
